title: How to Whitelist IPs for Redis in a Monday Code App and Queue System Alternatives?

posts.author: ethanolle1 (Ethan Sayagh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I have a quick question:

  • I’m using a Monday code app and need it to access a Redis instance for a queue system.
  • To do this, the IP address needs to be whitelisted on my Redis instance. Is there a way to get the app’s IP address?
  • Alternatively, do you know of any good queue system solutions that work well with Monday code apps?

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ethanolle1,

Matias here!

As of today, it is not possible to get the IP addresses that your app might use when hosted in monday code.
